metadata.name: Bastion Hosts
metadata.description: This module deploys a Bastion Host.
Required. The URI of the blob container where session recordings are stored, e.g. `https://<storageAccountName>.blob.core.windows.net/<containerName>`.
Optional. The resource ID of the user-assigned managed identity used to write session recordings to the blob container. If omitted, the system-assigned managed identity of the Bastion Host is used.
The type for the Session Recording configuration of the Bastion Host.
Required. The name of the Public IP Address.
Optional. Resource ID of the Public IP Prefix object. This is only needed if you want your Public IPs created in a PIP Prefix.
Optional. The public IP address allocation method.
Optional. A list of availability zones denoting the IP allocated for the resource needs to come from.
Optional. IP address version.
Optional. The DNS settings of the public IP address.
Optional. The list of tags associated with the public IP address.
Optional. The lock settings of the service.
Optional. Name of a public IP address SKU.
Optional. Tier of a public IP address SKU.
Optional. The DDoS protection plan configuration associated with the public IP address.
Optional. Location for the Public IP resource.
Optional. Array of role assignments to create for the Public IP resource.
Optional. Enable or disable usage telemetry for the Public IP module.
Optional. Idle timeout in minutes for the Public IP resource.
Optional. Tags to apply to the Public IP resource.
Optional. Diagnostic settings for the Public IP resource.
The type for the properties of the Public IP to create and be used by Azure Bastion, if no existing public IP was provided.
Optional. The name of the diagnostic setting.
Optional. Name of a Diagnostic Log category for a resource type this setting is applied to. Set the specific logs to collect here.
Optional. Name of a Diagnostic Log category group for a resource type this setting is applied to. Set to `allLogs` to collect all logs.
Optional. Enable or disable the category explicitly. Default is `true`.
Optional. The name of logs that will be streamed. "allLogs" includes all possible logs for the resource. Set to `[]` to disable log collection.
Required. Name of a Diagnostic Metric category for a resource type this setting is applied to. Set to `AllMetrics` to collect all metrics.
Optional. Enable or disable the category explicitly. Default is `true`.
Optional. The name of metrics that will be streamed. "allMetrics" includes all possible metrics for the resource. Set to `[]` to disable metric collection.
Optional. A string indicating whether the export to Log Analytics should use the default destination type, i.e. AzureDiagnostics, or use a destination type.

Optional. Resource ID of the diagnostic log analytics workspace. For security reasons, it is recommended to set diagnostic settings to send data to either storage account, log analytics workspace or event hub.

Optional. Resource ID of the diagnostic storage account. For security reasons, it is recommended to set diagnostic settings to send data to either storage account, log analytics workspace or event hub.
Optional. Resource ID of the diagnostic event hub authorization rule for the Event Hubs namespace in which the event hub should be created or streamed to.

Optional. Name of the diagnostic event hub within the namespace to which logs are streamed. Without this, an event hub is created for each log category. For security reasons, it is recommended to set diagnostic settings to send data to either storage account, log analytics workspace or event hub.
Optional. The full ARM resource ID of the Marketplace resource to which you would like to send Diagnostic Logs.
An AVM-aligned type for a diagnostic setting. To be used if both logs & metrics are supported by the resource provider.
Optional. The name of diagnostic setting.
Optional. Name of a Diagnostic Log category for a resource type this setting is applied to. Set the specific logs to collect here.
Optional. Name of a Diagnostic Log category group for a resource type this setting is applied to. Set to `allLogs` to collect all logs.
Optional. Enable or disable the category explicitly. Default is `true`.
Optional. The name of logs that will be streamed. "allLogs" includes all possible logs for the resource. Set to `[]` to disable log collection.
Optional. A string indicating whether the export to Log Analytics should use the default destination type, i.e. AzureDiagnostics, or use a destination type.

Optional. Resource ID of the diagnostic log analytics workspace. For security reasons, it is recommended to set diagnostic settings to send data to either storage account, log analytics workspace or event hub.

Optional. Resource ID of the diagnostic storage account. For security reasons, it is recommended to set diagnostic settings to send data to either storage account, log analytics workspace or event hub.
Optional. Resource ID of the diagnostic event hub authorization rule for the Event Hubs namespace in which the event hub should be created or streamed to.

Optional. Name of the diagnostic event hub within the namespace to which logs are streamed. Without this, an event hub is created for each log category. For security reasons, it is recommended to set diagnostic settings to send data to either storage account, log analytics workspace or event hub.
Optional. The full ARM resource ID of the Marketplace resource to which you would like to send Diagnostic Logs.
An AVM-aligned type for a diagnostic setting. To be used if only logs are supported by the resource provider.
Optional. Specify the name of lock.
Optional. Specify the type of lock.
Optional. Specify the notes of the lock.
An AVM-aligned type for a lock.
Optional. Enables system assigned managed identity on the resource.
Optional. The resource ID(s) to assign to the resource. Required if a user assigned identity is used for encryption.
An AVM-aligned type for a managed identity configuration. To be used if both a system-assigned & user-assigned identities are supported by the resource provider.
Optional. The name (as GUID) of the role assignment. If not provided, a GUID will be generated.

Required. The role to assign. You can provide either the display name of the role definition, the role definition GUID, or its fully qualified ID in the following format: '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/c2f4ef07-c644-48eb-af81-4b1b4947fb11'.
Required. The principal ID of the principal (user/group/identity) to assign the role to.
Optional. The principal type of the assigned principal ID.
Optional. The description of the role assignment.

Optional. The conditions on the role assignment. This limits the resources it can be assigned to. e.g.: @Resource[Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers:ContainerName] StringEqualsIgnoreCase "foo_storage_container".
Optional. Version of the condition.
Optional. The Resource Id of the delegated managed identity resource.
An AVM-aligned type for a role assignment.
Required. Name of the Azure Bastion resource.
Optional. Location for all resources.
Required. Shared services Virtual Network resource Id.

Optional. The Public IP resource ID to associate to the azureBastionSubnet. If empty, then the Public IP that is created as part of this module will be applied to the azureBastionSubnet. This parameter is ignored when enablePrivateOnlyBastion is true.
Optional. Specifies the properties of the Public IP to create and be used by Azure Bastion, if no existing public IP was provided. This parameter is ignored when enablePrivateOnlyBastion is true.
Optional. The diagnostic settings of the service.
Optional. The lock settings of the service.
Optional. The SKU of this Bastion Host.
Optional. Choose to disable or enable Copy Paste. For Basic and Developer SKU Copy/Paste is always enabled.
Optional. Choose to disable or enable File Copy. Not supported for Basic and Developer SKU.
Optional. Choose to disable or enable IP Connect. Not supported for Basic and Developer SKU.
Optional. Choose to disable or enable Kerberos authentication. Not supported for Developer SKU.
Optional. Choose to disable or enable Shareable Link. Not supported for Basic and Developer SKU.
Optional. Choose to disable or enable Session Recording feature. The Premium SKU is required for this feature. If Session Recording is enabled, the Native client support will be disabled.

Optional. The configuration for the Session Recording feature, specifying the blob container to store recordings in and the managed identity used to access it. Requires the Premium SKU and `enableSessionRecording` set to `true`.
Optional. Choose to disable or enable Private-only Bastion deployment. The Premium SKU is required for this feature.
Optional. The scale units for the Bastion Host resource. The Basic and Developer SKU only support 2 scale units.
Optional. Array of role assignments to create.
Optional. The managed identity definition for this resource. Note: Managed identity support for Azure Bastion is currently in preview and not yet reflected in the published resource provider schema.
Optional. Tags of the resource.
Optional. Enable/Disable usage telemetry for module.
Optional. The list of Availability zones to use for the zone-redundant resources.

variables.formattedUserAssignedIdentities: [reduce(map(coalesce(tryGet(parameters('managedIdentities'), 'userAssignedResourceIds'), createArray()), lambda('id', createObject(format('{0}', lambdaVariables('id')), createObject()))), createObject(), lambda('cur', 'next', union(lambdaVariables('cur'), lambdaVariables('next'))))]
variables.identity: [if(not(empty(parameters('managedIdentities'))), createObject('type', if(coalesce(tryGet(parameters('managedIdentities'), 'systemAssigned'), false()), if(not(empty(coalesce(tryGet(parameters('managedIdentities'), 'userAssignedResourceIds'), createObject()))), 'SystemAssigned,UserAssigned', 'SystemAssigned'), if(not(empty(coalesce(tryGet(parameters('managedIdentities'), 'userAssignedResourceIds'), createObject()))), 'UserAssigned', null())), 'userAssignedIdentities', if(not(empty(variables('formattedUserAssignedIdentities'))), variables('formattedUserAssignedIdentities'), null())), null())]

azureBastion.name: [parameters('name')]
azureBastion.properties: [union(createObject('scaleUnits', if(or(equals(parameters('skuName'), 'Basic'), equals(parameters('skuName'), 'Developer')), 2, parameters('scaleUnits')), 'ipConfigurations', if(equals(parameters('skuName'), 'Developer'), createArray(), createArray(createObject('name', 'IpConfAzureBastionSubnet', 'properties', union(createObject('subnet', createObject('id', format('{0}/subnets/AzureBastionSubnet', parameters('virtualNetworkResourceId')))), if(not(parameters('enablePrivateOnlyBastion')), createObject('publicIPAddress', createObject('id', if(not(empty(parameters('bastionSubnetPublicIpResourceId'))), parameters('bastionSubnetPublicIpResourceId'), reference('publicIPAddress').outputs.resourceId.value))), createObject())))))), if(equals(parameters('skuName'), 'Developer'), createObject('virtualNetwork', createObject('id', parameters('virtualNetworkResourceId'))), createObject()), if(or(or(equals(parameters('skuName'), 'Basic'), equals(parameters('skuName'), 'Standard')), equals(parameters('skuName'), 'Premium')), createObject('enableKerberos', parameters('enableKerberos')), createObject()), if(or(equals(parameters('skuName'), 'Standard'), equals(parameters('skuName'), 'Premium')), createObject('enableTunneling', if(equals(parameters('skuName'), 'Standard'), true(), if(parameters('enableSessionRecording'), false(), true())), 'disableCopyPaste', parameters('disableCopyPaste'), 'enableFileCopy', parameters('enableFileCopy'), 'enableIpConnect', parameters('enableIpConnect'), 'enableShareableLink', parameters('enableShareableLink')), createObject()), if(equals(parameters('skuName'), 'Premium'), createObject('enableSessionRecording', parameters('enableSessionRecording'), 'enablePrivateOnlyBastion', parameters('enablePrivateOnlyBastion')), createObject()), if(and(and(equals(parameters('skuName'), 'Premium'), parameters('enableSessionRecording')), not(empty(parameters('sessionRecordingConfiguration')))), createObject('sessionRecordingConfiguration', createObject('blobContainerUri', parameters('sessionRecordingConfiguration').blobContainerUri, 'identity', if(not(empty(tryGet(parameters('sessionRecordingConfiguration'), 'userAssignedIdentityResourceId'))), createObject('type', 'UserAssigned', 'userAssignedIdentityId', tryGet(parameters('sessionRecordingConfiguration'), 'userAssignedIdentityResourceId')), createObject('type', 'SystemAssigned')))), createObject()))]

properties.notes: [coalesce(tryGet(parameters('lock'), 'notes'), if(equals(tryGet(parameters('lock'), 'kind'), 'CanNotDelete'), 'Cannot delete resource or child resources.', 'Cannot delete or modify the resource or child resources.'))]

metadata.name: Public IP Addresses
metadata.description: This module deploys a Public IP Address.
Optional. The name of the diagnostic setting.
Optional. Name of a Diagnostic Log category for a resource type this setting is applied to. Set the specific logs to collect here.
Optional. Name of a Diagnostic Log category group for a resource type this setting is applied to. Set to `allLogs` to collect all logs.
Optional. Enable or disable the category explicitly. Default is `true`.
Optional. The name of logs that will be streamed. "allLogs" includes all possible logs for the resource. Set to `[]` to disable log collection.
Required. Name of a Diagnostic Metric category for a resource type this setting is applied to. Set to `AllMetrics` to collect all metrics.
Optional. Enable or disable the category explicitly. Default is `true`.
Optional. The name of metrics that will be streamed. "allMetrics" includes all possible metrics for the resource. Set to `[]` to disable metric collection.
Optional. A string indicating whether the export to Log Analytics should use the default destination type, i.e. AzureDiagnostics, or use a destination type.

Optional. Resource ID of the diagnostic log analytics workspace. For security reasons, it is recommended to set diagnostic settings to send data to either storage account, log analytics workspace or event hub.

Optional. Resource ID of the diagnostic storage account. For security reasons, it is recommended to set diagnostic settings to send data to either storage account, log analytics workspace or event hub.
Optional. Resource ID of the diagnostic event hub authorization rule for the Event Hubs namespace in which the event hub should be created or streamed to.

Optional. Name of the diagnostic event hub within the namespace to which logs are streamed. Without this, an event hub is created for each log category. For security reasons, it is recommended to set diagnostic settings to send data to either storage account, log analytics workspace or event hub.
Optional. The full ARM resource ID of the Marketplace resource to which you would like to send Diagnostic Logs.
An AVM-aligned type for a diagnostic setting. To be used if both logs & metrics are supported by the resource provider.

Optional. The name (as GUID) of the role assignment. If not provided, a GUID will be generated.

Required. The role to assign. You can provide either the display name of the role definition, the role definition GUID, or its fully qualified ID in the following format: '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/c2f4ef07-c644-48eb-af81-4b1b4947fb11'.
Required. The principal ID of the principal (user/group/identity) to assign the role to.
Optional. The principal type of the assigned principal ID.
Optional. The description of the role assignment.

Optional. The conditions on the role assignment. This limits the resources it can be assigned to. e.g.: @Resource[Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/blobServices/containers:ContainerName] StringEqualsIgnoreCase "foo_storage_container".
Optional. Version of the condition.
Optional. The Resource Id of the delegated managed identity resource.
An AVM-aligned type for a role assignment.

Optional. Resource ID of the Public IP Prefix object. This is only needed if you want your Public IPs created in a PIP Prefix.

properties.notes: [coalesce(tryGet(parameters('lock'), 'notes'), if(equals(tryGet(parameters('lock'), 'kind'), 'CanNotDelete'), 'Cannot delete resource or child resources.', 'Cannot delete or modify the resource or child resources.'))]

metadata.description: The resource group the public IP address was deployed into.
The name of the public IP address.
The resource ID of the public IP address.
The public IP address of the public IP address resource.
The location the resource was deployed into.
